requirement_topic.en: EMC, RCD, Earthing, and Electrical Safety Evidence

summary.en: Vietnam-facing EVSE documentation should include IEC-family EMC and electrical safety evidence suited to the installation. IEC 61851-21-2 addresses EMC for off-board EV charging systems, while IEC 61851-1 is the general EV conductive charging safety baseline used for protection, control, and installation interfaces.
summary.zh: 面向越南的 EVSE 文件应包含适合安装场景的 IEC 体系 EMC 和电气安全证据。IEC 61851-21-2 适用于非车载电动汽车充电系统 EMC，IEC 61851-1 是用于保护、控制和安装接口的电动汽车传导充电通用安全基线。
summary.zht: 面向越南的 EVSE 文件應包含適合安裝場景的 IEC 體系 EMC 和電氣安全證據。IEC 61851-21-2 適用於非車載電動汽車充電系統 EMC，IEC 61851-1 是用於保護、控制和安裝介面的電動汽車傳導充電通用安全基線。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-21-2: EMC requirements for off-board electric vehicle charging systems
Project-specific RCD, residual DC detection, earthing, surge protection, IP rating, and installation requirements

summary.en: China's common GB-standard baseline includes GB/T 18487.1 for conductive charging systems and GB/T 18487.2 for off-board conductive supply equipment EMC. These are not automatic substitutes for Vietnam-facing IEC / TCVN evidence.
summary.zh: 中国常见 GB 标准基线包括传导充电系统 GB/T 18487.1 及非车载传导供电设备 EMC 的 GB/T 18487.2。二者不能自动替代面向越南的 IEC / TCVN 证据。
summary.zht: 中國常見 GB 標準基線包括傳導充電系統 GB/T 18487.1 及非車載傳導供電設備 EMC 的 GB/T 18487.2。二者不能自動替代面向越南的 IEC / TCVN 證據。

gap.en: Prepare EMC reports, RCD or RDC-DD selection evidence, residual DC protection data, earthing design, surge protection ratings, enclosure ratings, thermal limits, and installation instructions matched to the Vietnamese site and utility design.
gap.zh: 应准备 EMC 报告、RCD 或 RDC-DD 选型证据、直流剩余电流保护数据、接地设计、浪涌保护额定值、外壳等级、热限制，以及与越南现场和公用事业设计匹配的安装说明。
gap.zht: 應準備 EMC 報告、RCD 或 RDC-DD 選型證據、直流剩餘電流保護數據、接地設計、浪湧保護額定值、外殼等級、熱限制，以及與越南現場和公用事業設計匹配的安裝說明。

mandatory_status.target: Scope-dependent; mandatory when required by electrical installation approval, utility review, tender, or incorporated TCVN / IEC route
mandatory_status.cn: China GB-standard EMC and safety evidence does not automatically satisfy Vietnam TCVN / IEC or site approval expectations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T 18487 safety and EMC files should be remapped to the IEC / TCVN evidence requested for the Vietnamese installation, especially RCD, residual DC, earthing, and EMC details.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T 18487 安全和 EMC 文件应重新映射至越南安装所要求的 IEC / TCVN 证据，尤其是 RCD、直流剩余电流、接地和 EMC 细节。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T 18487 安全和 EMC 文件應重新映射至越南安裝所要求的 IEC / TCVN 證據，尤其是 RCD、直流剩餘電流、接地和 EMC 細節。
